EduPlatform: Complete Beginner Notes (Every File + Student/Instructor/Admin Flow)

Goal of this note: Make the full project easy to understand even if you are new to MERN.

React Redux Toolkit Node.js + Express MongoDB + Mongoose JWT Auth Stripe Socket.io

Easy memory: Frontend page -> API call -> Route -> Controller -> Model -> MongoDB -> JSON response -> Redux -> UI update.

1. Project in Very Simple Words

  • Student side: register, login, browse courses, enroll, watch lessons, take quizzes, submit assignments, ask questions, review course, download certificate.
  • Instructor side: create course, add lessons, add quiz, create assignments, answer student questions, submit course for admin approval.
  • Admin side: approve/reject courses, manage users, view full platform analytics, delete bad users/courses.

2. Architecture Map

client (React + Redux)
  |-- Pages (UI)
  |-- API (Axios with token)
  |-- Slices (state management)
        |
        v
server (Express)
  |-- routes/ (URL mapping)
  |-- middleware/ (auth, errors, uploads)
  |-- controllers/ (business logic)
  |-- services/ (helper domain logic)
  |-- models/ (MongoDB schemas)
        |
        v
MongoDB (actual data)

3. File-by-File Explanation (Full Project)

Root-level files
FileWhat it doesWhy it matters
README.mdMain project documentation (features, stack, setup, endpoints).First file to understand project quickly.
DEPLOYMENT.mdDeployment and CI/CD guide.Helps move project to production.
.gitignoreIgnored files list.Prevents secrets and heavy files from git.
.github files
FilePurposeNotes
.github/workflows/backend.ymlBackend CI: install, lint, test, build.Checks backend quality on push to main.
.github/workflows/frontend.ymlFrontend CI: install and build.Ensures frontend can compile.
.github/index.htmlThis notes file.Your learning reference.
Server: Entry + Config
FilePurposeKey code idea
server/server.jsStarts app, middleware, routes, socket, DB.app.use('/api/v1/...') + connectDB() + initSocket(server).
server/config/db.jsMongoDB connect with retry and listeners.mongoose.connect(MONGO_URI).
server/config/cloudinary.jsCloudinary credentials setup.Used for media uploads.
server/config/stripe.jsStripe SDK init.Used by payment controller.
server/.env.exampleBackend env template.Documents required secrets.
server/package.jsonBackend scripts + dependencies.dev, test, lint, start.
server/DockerfileContainer image setup for backend.Runs npm start on port 5000.
server/seed.jsSeeds demo users/courses/lessons/etc.Useful for fast testing/demo data.
server/uploads/documents/...Sample uploaded assignment document.Shows local upload output.
Server: Middleware + Utils + Socket + Services + Tests
FilePurposeImportant logic
server/middleware/auth.jsAuth + RBAC middleware.Reads JWT from Authorization, sets req.user, validates role.
server/middleware/errorHandler.jsUnified API error response.Handles validation, duplicate key, cast, JWT errors.
server/middleware/upload.jsMulter config for image/video/document uploads.Cloudinary for media, local disk for documents.
server/utils/helpers.jsasyncHandler and ApiError.Cleaner controller code, central error style.
server/utils/validators.jsRequest body validation rules.Auth/course/quiz/review validators.
server/socket/socket.jsSocket.io server + token auth + user rooms.Push notification events to user:{id} room.
server/services/certificateEligibility.jsChecks lessons + quizzes completion.Single source of certificate truth.
server/services/courseModeration.jsAI + heuristic legitimacy review for courses.Supports admin moderation.
server/services/notification.jsCreate DB notification + send socket event.Persists + real-time both.
server/services/recommendation.jsCategory/tag based recommendation scoring.Content-based ranking logic.
server/tests/helpers.test.jsTests helper utilities.Checks ApiError, asyncHandler.
server/tests/errorHandler.test.jsTests error middleware cases.Validation, duplicate key, cast, JWT.
Server: Route files (URL to Controller mapping)
FileMain endpointsPurpose
server/routes/authRoutes.js/register, /login, /meAuthentication and profile.
server/routes/courseRoutes.js/, /:id, /my-courses, nested subroutesMain course APIs + nested lessons/quizzes/reviews/questions/assignments.
server/routes/lessonRoutes.js/, /:id, /:id/ai-tutorLesson CRUD and AI tutor.
server/routes/quizRoutes.js/, /generate, /:id/attemptQuiz create/read/attempt.
server/routes/reviewRoutes.js/Add/get course reviews.
server/routes/enrollmentRoutes.js/, /my, /:id/progress, certificateEnroll and progress APIs.
server/routes/paymentRoutes.js/create-checkout, /verify/:sessionIdStripe flow.
server/routes/bookmarkRoutes.js/:courseId, /Bookmark toggle/list.
server/routes/questionRoutes.js/, /my, /instructor, /:id/answerStudent-instructor Q&A.
server/routes/assignmentRoutes.js/, /:assignmentId/submissionsAssignment CRUD/submission.
server/routes/notificationRoutes.js/, /read-all, /:id/readNotification inbox actions.
server/routes/adminRoutes.js/users, /courses/pending, /analyticsAdmin actions.
Server: Controller files (Business logic)
FileWhat it handlesCore functions
server/controllers/authController.jsRegister/login/get/update profile.register, login, getMe, updateMe
server/controllers/courseController.jsCourse listing/detail/CRUD/recommendations/analytics.getCourses, getCourse, createCourse, submitCourse, getRecommendations
server/controllers/lessonController.jsLesson CRUD + AI tutor fallback flow.addLesson, updateLesson, deleteLesson, askAITutor
server/controllers/enrollmentController.jsEnroll/progress/certificate/student analytics.enroll, updateProgress, getCertificate, restartCourse
server/controllers/quizController.jsQuiz create/read/attempt/AI generation.createQuiz, getQuiz, submitAttempt, generateAIQuiz
server/controllers/reviewController.jsReview add/list and rating recalculation.addReview, getReviews
server/controllers/paymentController.jsStripe checkout + verify + auto-enroll.createCheckout, verifyPayment
server/controllers/bookmarkController.jsBookmark toggle/get.toggleBookmark, getBookmarks
server/controllers/questionController.jsAsk question, list questions, answer question.askQuestion, getStudentQuestions, getInstructorQuestions, answerQuestion
server/controllers/assignmentController.jsAssignments + submissions workflow.createAssignment, submitAssignment, getAssignmentSubmissions
server/controllers/notificationController.jsNotification fetch/read actions.getNotifications, markAsRead, markAllAsRead
server/controllers/adminController.jsUser admin + course moderation + analytics.getUsers, updateCourseStatus, deleteCourse, getAnalytics
Server: Model files (MongoDB schema layer)
FileStoresImportant fields
server/models/User.jsUser account and role data.name,email,password,role,bookmarks + password hash + JWT methods.
server/models/Course.jsCourse metadata and status.title,description,category,price,instructor,lessons,status,avgRating,totalStudents
server/models/Lesson.jsCourse lessons.course,title,videoUrl,order,content,isFreePreview
server/models/Enrollment.jsStudent enrollment and progress.student,course,progress[],completionPercentage,completedAt
server/models/Quiz.jsQuiz definitions.course,title,questions[],passingScore
server/models/QuizAttempt.jsQuiz attempts per student.student,quiz,answers,score,passed
server/models/Review.jsCourse reviews.student,course,rating,comment unique by student+course.
server/models/Payment.jsStripe transaction tracking.student,course,amount,stripeSessionId,status
server/models/Notification.jsNotification history.user,message,type,read,link
server/models/Assignment.jsAssignment posted by instructor.course,instructor,title,description,fileUrl,dueDate
server/models/AssignmentSubmission.jsStudent assignment submissions.assignment,course,student,fileUrl,notes
server/models/Question.jsStudent questions and instructor answers.course,lesson,student,instructor,question,answer,status
Client: Core app files
FilePurposeKey point
client/src/main.jsxReact app entry point.Renders <App />.
client/src/App.jsxAll route definitions + layout.Uses ProtectedRoute by role.
client/src/api/index.jsAxios config and interceptors.Auto-attaches JWT and handles 401 logout.
client/src/app/store.jsRedux store setup.Registers auth, courses, enrollments reducers.
client/src/socket.jsSocket.io client connector.Connects using token.
client/src/index.cssMain design system CSS.Colors, components, utility classes, responsive styles.
client/src/App.cssVite starter styles (legacy/minor).Not core to main UI now.
Client: Redux files
FileWhat state it managesMain thunks/actions
client/src/features/authSlice.jsUser auth/session.register, login, getMe, logout, clearError
client/src/features/courseSlice.jsCourse catalog/current/my/recommendations.fetchCourses, fetchCourse, fetchMyCourses, fetchRecommendations
client/src/features/enrollmentSlice.jsEnrollments and progress.fetchMyEnrollments, enrollInCourse, updateProgress
Client: Components + Hooks + Utils
FilePurposeHow used
client/src/components/Navbar.jsxTop navigation, theme toggle, unread count.Visible on all pages.
client/src/components/Footer.jsxFooter links and branding.Visible on all pages.
client/src/components/ProtectedRoute.jsxProtect routes by auth + role.Used in App.jsx.
client/src/components/CourseCard.jsxReusable course card with bookmark.Used in Home/Courses/Student dashboard recommendation.
client/src/components/LoadingSpinner.jsxLoader + skeleton helpers.Shown while API data loads.
client/src/hooks/useDarkMode.jsDark mode toggle with localStorage.Used by Navbar.
client/src/utils/categoryThumbnails.jsFallback gradient/icon mapping per category.Used by CourseCard thumbnails.
Client: Page files
FileMain purposeImportant API interactions
client/src/pages/Home.jsxLanding page + featured courses.fetchCourses({limit:8})
client/src/pages/Courses.jsxCourse listing with filters/search/sort/pagination.fetchCourses(params)
client/src/pages/CourseDetail.jsxSingle course detail + enroll/purchase./courses/:id, /enrollments, /payments/create-checkout, /reviews
client/src/pages/CoursePlayer.jsxStudent learning player.Loads course+enrollment+quizzes+questions+assignments+reviews and supports progress updates.
client/src/pages/Login.jsxLogin screen.dispatch(login())
client/src/pages/Register.jsxRegistration screen with role choose.dispatch(register())
client/src/pages/StudentDashboard.jsxStudent stats, my courses, recommendations./enrollments/analytics, fetchMyEnrollments, fetchRecommendations
client/src/pages/InstructorDashboard.jsxInstructor summary and course create/manage./courses create/update/delete/submit, /courses/instructor-analytics
client/src/pages/InstructorCourseEditor.jsxDetailed course editor panel.Lessons/quizzes/assignments/questions endpoints under /courses/:id/*
client/src/pages/AdminDashboard.jsxAdmin users/courses moderation/analytics./admin/* APIs + review/approve/reject flows.
client/src/pages/Notifications.jsxUser notification inbox./notifications, mark read APIs.
client/src/pages/PaymentSuccess.jsxStripe callback verification page./payments/verify/:sessionId
Client: Build/config/public files
FilePurposeNotes
client/package.jsonFrontend scripts and dependencies.dev/build/lint/preview.
client/vite.config.jsVite setup + backend proxy./api -> localhost:5000 in dev.
client/eslint.config.jsLinting rules.Code quality checks.
client/.env.exampleFrontend env template.VITE_API_URL, optional VITE_SOCKET_URL.
client/index.htmlRoot HTML for Vite app.Mount point for React.
client/README.mdVite starter docs.Template notes.
client/copy-images.cjsScript to copy category images into public.Utility script, not runtime app logic.
client/public/favicon.svgBrowser tab icon.Branding asset.
client/public/icons.svgSVG icons sprite/asset.UI asset file.
client/src/assets/*Image assets (hero/react/vite).Visual resources.
Lock files and generated/support files
FilePurpose
client/package-lock.jsonNPM exact dependency lock for frontend.
server/package-lock.jsonNPM exact dependency lock for backend.

4. Core Code Understanding (Beginner)

A) JWT auth middleware (why private APIs are secure)

// server/middleware/auth.js
const authHeader = req.headers.authorization;
if (!authHeader || !authHeader.startsWith('Bearer ')) return 401;
const token = authHeader.split(' ')[1];
const decoded = jwt.verify(token, process.env.JWT_SECRET);
const user = await User.findById(decoded.id);
req.user = user;
  • Reads token from request header.
  • Verifies token is real and not tampered.
  • Loads user and attaches to req.user.
  • Now controller knows who is calling API.

B) Axios interceptor (frontend sends token automatically)

// client/src/api/index.js
API.interceptors.request.use((config) => {
  const token = localStorage.getItem('token');
  if (token) config.headers.Authorization = `Bearer ${token}`;
  return config;
});

So you do not manually add token in every API call.

C) Enrollment progress and certificate logic

// server/controllers/enrollmentController.js (simplified)
lessonProgress.completed = true;
enrollment.completionPercentage = ...;
const eligibility = await evaluateEnrollmentCertificateEligibility(...);
if (eligibility.eligible) enrollment.completedAt = new Date();

Certificate is unlocked only when lessons are done and required quizzes are passed.

5. Student Module Flow (Exact Files + APIs)

Step 1: Student registers or logs in

Frontend files: client/src/pages/Register.jsx, client/src/pages/Login.jsx, client/src/features/authSlice.js

Backend files: server/routes/authRoutes.js -> server/controllers/authController.js -> server/models/User.js

Endpoints: POST /api/v1/auth/register, POST /api/v1/auth/login

Step 2: Student browses courses

Frontend: Home.jsx, Courses.jsx, CourseCard.jsx, courseSlice.js

Backend: courseRoutes.js -> courseController.getCourses -> Course model

Endpoint: GET /api/v1/courses

Step 3: Student enrolls (free) or pays (paid)

Frontend: CourseDetail.jsx, enrollmentSlice.js, PaymentSuccess.jsx

Backend free path: enrollmentRoutes.js -> enrollmentController.enroll

Backend paid path: paymentRoutes.js -> paymentController.createCheckout -> Stripe -> verifyPayment auto-enroll

Endpoints: POST /enrollments, POST /payments/create-checkout, GET /payments/verify/:sessionId

Step 4: Student learns in Course Player

Frontend: CoursePlayer.jsx

Backend APIs used:

  • GET /courses/:id (course + lessons)
  • GET /enrollments/my (student enrollments/progress)
  • PUT /enrollments/:id/progress (mark lesson complete)
  • GET /courses/:courseId/quizzes + POST /attempt
  • GET /enrollments/:id/certificate and download endpoint

Step 5: Student does engagement actions

  • Bookmark: CourseCard.jsx -> bookmarkRoutes/controller
  • Review: CourseDetail.jsx / CoursePlayer.jsx -> reviewRoutes/controller
  • Ask question: CoursePlayer.jsx -> questionRoutes/controller
  • Assignments: CoursePlayer.jsx -> assignmentRoutes/controller
  • Notifications: Notifications.jsx -> notificationRoutes/controller

6. Instructor Module Flow (Exact Files + APIs)

Step 1: Instructor creates course

Frontend: InstructorDashboard.jsx form submits POST /courses

Backend: courseRoutes.js (instructor role) -> courseController.createCourse -> Course model

Step 2: Instructor edits full course content

Frontend: InstructorCourseEditor.jsx

Backend areas:

  • Lessons: lessonRoutes.js -> lessonController
  • Quizzes: quizRoutes.js -> quizController
  • Assignments: assignmentRoutes.js -> assignmentController
  • Questions answers: questionRoutes.js -> questionController.answerQuestion

Step 3: Instructor submits course for review

Frontend: InstructorDashboard.jsx submit button

Backend: PUT /courses/:id/submit -> courseController.submitCourse (status changes to pending)

Step 4: Instructor tracks analytics and feedback

Frontend: InstructorDashboard.jsx (analytics API), InstructorCourseEditor.jsx (questions/submissions)

Backend: getInstructorAnalytics in courseController, question/assignment controllers.

7. Admin Module Flow (Exact Files + APIs)

Step 1: Admin opens dashboard and sees platform analytics

Frontend: AdminDashboard.jsx

Backend: GET /admin/analytics -> adminController.getAnalytics

Step 2: Admin reviews pending courses

Frontend: AdminDashboard.jsx review panel

Backend: GET /admin/courses/pending + GET /admin/courses/:id/review

Review endpoint uses courseModeration.js to get AI legitimacy suggestions.

Step 3: Admin approves or rejects course

Backend: PUT /admin/courses/:id/status -> adminController.updateCourseStatus

It updates course status and creates notification to instructor.

Step 4: Admin manages users

  • GET /admin/users list users
  • PUT /admin/users/:id/role change role
  • DELETE /admin/users/:id remove user

Step 5: Admin can delete harmful courses deeply

adminController.deleteCourse removes linked lessons, enrollments, reviews, payments, quizzes, attempts, assignments, questions, bookmarks references.

8. End-to-End Request Example (One Real Journey)

Example: Student marks lesson complete

  1. UI click: CoursePlayer.jsx button markLessonComplete().
  2. API request: PUT /api/v1/enrollments/:id/progress with { lessonId }.
  3. Route: server/routes/enrollmentRoutes.js.
  4. Auth middleware: validates JWT and role student.
  5. Controller: updateProgress in enrollmentController.js.
  6. Model updates: Enrollment progress array and completion %.
  7. Service check: certificateEligibility.js decides if certificate unlocked.
  8. Response: updated enrollment JSON sent back.
  9. Frontend refresh: loadData() reloads and UI shows new progress.

9. Beginner Revision Plan (What to Study First)

Week 1 (Must know)

  • Read server/server.js fully.
  • Understand auth.js middleware.
  • Understand route -> controller -> model flow using one feature (login).
  • Understand client/src/api/index.js and one slice (authSlice.js).

Week 2 (Role flows)

  • Student flow: CourseDetail -> Enrollment -> CoursePlayer.
  • Instructor flow: InstructorDashboard -> InstructorCourseEditor.
  • Admin flow: AdminDashboard -> moderation endpoints.
  • Payments and notifications basics.

If you can explain one full flow (with file names and endpoints), you are interview-ready for beginner/full-stack intern level.

Do not memorize everything at once. Learn one module at a time and map it to files.
